description: Builds a mine-rescue emergency response plan for a specific mine — emergency scenarios, rescue-team mobilisation, mutual-aid / rescue-station links, NDMA / DGMS alignment, and a drills schedule. Use it to draft or review a mine-rescue ERP, an emergency-preparedness plan for a mine, or a rescue-mobilisation procedure. Decision-support that drafts a reviewable plan; a competent person validates the mobilisation realism and signs off.
name: mine-rescue-erp
